License

All graphical assets in this template are licensed for personal and commercial use. If you'd like to use a specific asset, please check the license below.

Images

All images used in Planting the Bay Webflow template are sourced from Midjourney ensuring they are properly licensed for use in our projects.

Font

All designs created by Planting the Bay Webflow template use Inter Font and Switzer, which is a free and open-use typeface. You are free to use our designs without any font licensing restrictions.

All designs created by Planting the Bay Webflow template use Inter Font and Switzer, which is a free and open-use typeface. You are free to use our designs without any font licensing restrictions.

Icon

All icons used in Planting the Bay Webflow template are created by SVG Repo. You are free to use our designs without any licensing restrictions.

Overview

Berkeley first. A Bay Area church-planting and campus-ministry movement built to expand across the region.
